cross_scene_arcs.title: From Recognition to Rejection: Debi's Evolving Response to Martin's Return
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Debi progresses from initial recognition of Martin, through cautious reconnection and moral confrontation, to final rejection based on his violent identity, punctuated by a non-response to his marriage proposal and a fleeting moment of peace.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Debi notices Martin's presence with subtle emotional disturbance.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Debi acknowledges the relationship is unsustainable but shares a brief, genuine human connection with Martin.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: her need for moral compatibility in relationships

cross_scene_arcs.title: Moral Confrontation and Ethical Boundaries
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Debi repeatedly challenges Martin’s self-justifications and evasiveness, culminating in her explicit rejection of him as a 'monster' after witnessing the consequences of his violence.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Debi questions Martin's truthfulness about his identity and actions.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Debi defines a clear moral boundary, refusing to be with someone who kills.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Martin does not fully explain his work or commit to changing his path

cross_scene_arcs.title: The Push and Pull of Intimacy
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Debi moves from skeptical openness to active planning, then physical intimacy, before retreating into silence and emotional withdrawal after Martin's proposal under duress.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Debi is conditionally open to reconnecting with Martin.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Debi remains emotionally overwhelmed and does not respond to Martin's marriage proposal.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Debi's decision about Martin's marriage proposal is not communicated

cross_scene_arcs.title: Public Platform as Personal Agency
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Debi uses her role as a radio host to assert control over the narrative of her relationship with Martin, shifting from passive observer to active interrogator and decision-maker.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Debi is disrupted during a live broadcast by Martin's unexpected appearance.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Debi takes initiative by calling Martin to confirm a date, using her voice and platform as tools of agency.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: her lingering doubt about Martin's stability

cross_scene_arcs.title: Consolidation of Power and Recruitment Efforts
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Grocer attempts to expand his influence by recruiting Martin into a consolidated network of elite assassins, escalating from persuasion to organized enforcement when rejected.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Proposes professional alliance to Martin based on past relationship
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Commands a nine-member tactical team preparing for coordinated operation
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Martin's refusal undermines the legitimacy of Grocer's network

cross_scene_arcs.title: Escalation of Conflict with Martin
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: The adversarial relationship between Grocer and Martin intensifies from recruitment attempt to direct confrontation, culminating in a fatal showdown.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Martin rejects Grocer's offer of collaboration
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Grocer killed by Martin during violent exchange at Newberry house

cross_scene_arcs.title: Operational Rise and Collapse
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Grocer transitions from a remote operator managing high-value transactions to a field commander whose operation unravels upon encountering Martin, ending in his death.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Demonstrates financial and operational control via remote wire transfer
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Killed during failed assault, operation aborted
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Fate of Grocer's organization after his death

cross_scene_arcs.title: Assault on Newberry House
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Grocer leads a coordinated attack on the Newberry residence, shifting from direct assault to covert psychological tactics before being killed in a final confrontation with Martin.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Arrives at Newberry house with armed team and weapons
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Killed during exchange with Martin inside the house
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Whether the team had broader objectives beyond eliminating Martin

cross_scene_arcs.title: Descent into Emotional Detachment
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Martin transitions from a detached professional assassin to someone increasingly aware of his emotional numbness and alienation, expressing weariness and fear of personal connection.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: acknowledges alienation and fear of domesticity
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: inability to form meaningful connections or find fulfillment in work

cross_scene_arcs.title: Confrontation with the Past
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Martin is forced to face his personal history through the reunion, reconnecting with his mother and Debi, leading to escalating emotional exposure and failed attempts at reconciliation.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: avoids personal past, suppresses emotional triggers
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: achieves mutual understanding with Debi without expectation of reconciliation
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: emotional incompatibility due to his violent life

cross_scene_arcs.title: Moral Reckoning and Abandonment of the Assassin Role
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Martin moves from expressing dissatisfaction with his work to actively refusing a hit and protecting his target, culminating in violent self-defense and moral self-awareness.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: refuses assassination, protects target, admits immorality of his work
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: ambiguity in his motivation for change and future path

cross_scene_arcs.title: Attempted Reconnection with Debi
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Martin attempts to reestablish a romantic connection with Debi, progressing from awkward disclosure to a vulnerable proposal, but ultimately accepts their incompatibility.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: re-enters Debi's life with emotional distance
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: shares a moment of peace and acceptance without reconciliation
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Debi's inability to accept his violent reality

cross_scene_arcs.title: Journey Toward Self-Acceptance
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Martin evolves from alienation and fear of identity to confronting his choices, protecting others, and accepting himself without illusion.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: fearful of domesticity and disconnected from peers
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: accepts himself as the sum of his choices, finds peace without expectation of change
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: his lifestyle remains incompatible with sustaining relationships
